subcodes.first_line: Ḥájí Riḍá hath attained unto the presence of God. It behooveth him to render thanks unto God for this bounty. The turning of the beloved ones towards this direction is wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حاجی رضا بلقا فائز شده ینبغی له ان یشکر الله بذلک توجه احباب باین شطر مصلحت
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital
